chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5542 of 2018 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders as to maintainability. 24.02.2025 Mirza Sarfaraz Ahmed, advocate for the petitioners. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2018 for orders as to maintainability. Prima facie the impugned order is dated 25.05.2007, however, petition was filed in 2018, hence, barred by laches. Even otherwise, the impugned order has been issued in Lahore, and no case is made out to entertain a challenged thereto in territorial limits of this court. In view hereof, petition is found to be mis- conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
